title: PRD: PM strategy-ready discovery packet
problem_summary: PMs still lose time and judgment quality because strategy context is reconstructed too late from scattered discovery artifacts.
outcome_summary: ProductOS produces one reviewable strategy-ready discovery packet that links mission, vision, market posture, and problem framing so a PM can choose the next bet faster.
scope_summary: Add strategy-spine artifacts, preserve them through discovery routing, keep one synced Product Strategy / Vision doc, and emit downstream concept and problem framing with explicit strategy traceability.
